meta.description: MySQL 到 GoldenDB 迁移兼容性规则集 — GoldenDB 高度兼容 MySQL 5.7/8.0
meta.author: DMA Team

rules.name: IFNULL 兼容
rules.description: MySQL IFNULL 在 GoldenDB 中直接兼容

rules.name: NOW() 兼容
rules.description: MySQL NOW() 在 GoldenDB 中直接兼容

rules.name: GROUP_CONCAT → 需验证
rules.description: GoldenDB 支持 GROUP_CONCAT，但分布式场景下性能差异需验证

rules.name: UUID → UUID
rules.description: MySQL UUID() 在 GoldenDB 中直接兼容

rules.name: FIND_IN_SET 兼容
rules.description: MySQL FIND_IN_SET 在 GoldenDB 中直接兼容
rules.exampleSqlSource: SELECT * FROM t WHERE FIND_IN_SET('a', tags);
rules.exampleSqlTarget: SELECT * FROM t WHERE FIND_IN_SET('a', tags);

rules.name: 反引号兼容
rules.description: GoldenDB 直接兼容 MySQL 反引号

rules.name: AUTO_INCREMENT 兼容
rules.exampleSqlSource: CREATE TABLE t (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY);
rules.exampleSqlTarget: CREATE TABLE t (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY);

rules.name: ENGINE → 移除
rules.description: GoldenDB 存储引擎由系统统一管理，ENGINE 子句需移除

rules.name: LIMIT m,n → LIMIT n OFFSET m
rules.description: 推荐使用 LIMIT n OFFSET m 语法（GoldenDB 兼容两种写法）

rules.name: ENUM → VARCHAR+CHECK
rules.description: 推荐使用 VARCHAR + CHECK 约束替代 ENUM
rules.exampleSqlTarget: CREATE TABLE t (status VARCHAR(1) CHECK (status IN ('A','B','C')));

rules.name: TINYINT → SMALLINT
rules.description: GoldenDB 兼容 TINYINT，但推荐 SMALLINT 提高可移植性

rules.name: JSON → JSON
rules.description: GoldenDB 支持 JSON 类型

rules.name: 分区表语法
rules.description: GoldenDB 分区策略由系统自动管理，建议使用默认分片键
rules.exampleSqlSource: CREATE TABLE t (id INT) PARTITION BY RANGE (id) (PARTITION p0 VALUES LESS THAN (100));

rules.name: 外键约束 → 应用层
rules.description: GoldenDB 分布式场景外键性能影响较大，建议应用层维护
rules.exampleSqlSource: ALTER TABLE orders ADD FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id);
rules.exampleSqlTarget: ALTER TABLE orders ADD FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id);

rules.name: 字符集 utf8mb4
rules.description: GoldenDB 推荐 utf8mb4 字符集
rules.exampleSqlSource: CREATE TABLE t (name VARCHAR(100)) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4;
rules.exampleSqlTarget: CREATE TABLE t (name VARCHAR(100)) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4;

rules.name: 系统变量差异
rules.description: GoldenDB 支持部分 MySQL 系统变量，部分变量行为不同

rules.name: 存储过程语法
rules.description: GoldenDB 兼容 MySQL 存储过程语法，但分布式事务处理需评估
rules.exampleSqlSource: CREATE PROCEDURE p1() BEGIN SELECT 1; END;
rules.exampleSqlTarget: CREATE PROCEDURE p1() BEGIN SELECT 1; END;
